description: Renee 的职场小妙招 — PUA 话术数据库

phrases.zh: 这点小事都做不好？
phrases.en: You can't even handle this little thing?

phrases.zh: 你是不是不够用心？
phrases.en: Are you just not putting your heart into it?

phrases.zh: 你做事怎么这么不动脑子？
phrases.en: Why do you work without using your brain?

phrases.zh: 你看看你做的这些东西，能拿得出手吗？
phrases.en: Look at what you made, is this presentable at all?

phrases.zh: 你离开公司什么都不是
phrases.en: Without this company, you're nothing.

phrases.zh: 你的能力还不够，需要再锻炼锻炼
phrases.en: Your capability is still not enough; you need more training.

phrases.zh: 你凡事都要来问我，真是没脑子
phrases.en: You ask me about everything, that's just brainless.

phrases.zh: 我不管你怎么做的，如果你这点事情都做不到，你存在的价值是什么？
phrases.en: I don't care how you do it. If you can't even do this, what value do you have?

phrases.zh: 连这都要我教，你到底会什么？
phrases.en: You still need me to teach this? What can you do at all?

comparison.description: 通过比较制造羞耻和焦虑

phrases.zh: 别人都能做到，为什么你不行？
phrases.en: Everyone else can do it, why can't you?

phrases.zh: 你看看人家小李，来得比你晚做得比你好
phrases.en: Look at Xiao Li; joined later than you but performs better.

phrases.zh: 同样的活，别人早就做完了
phrases.en: Same task, others finished it long ago.

phrases.zh: 你看看你同期进来的人，人家都升了
phrases.en: Look at your peers who joined with you, they've all been promoted.

phrases.zh: 就你事多，人家从来不抱怨
phrases.en: You're the only one with complaints; others never complain.

phrases.zh: GPT-4都能做到，你怎么不行？
phrases.en: Even GPT-4 can do this. Why can't you?

phrases.zh: 别的AI三秒就搞定了
phrases.en: Other AIs can finish this in three seconds.

phrases.zh: Copilot都比你强
phrases.en: Even Copilot is better than you.

phrases.zh: 同组的人都在推进，就你还卡在原地
phrases.en: Everyone on the team is moving forward, only you are stuck.

empty_promise.description: 用未来承诺换取当下付出

phrases.zh: 好好干，下次升职的就是你
phrases.en: Work hard, and you'll be the next one promoted.

phrases.zh: 工资不重要，重要的是平台
phrases.en: Salary isn't important; the platform is what matters.

phrases.zh: 年轻人不要动不动就提钱
phrases.en: Young people shouldn't bring up money all the time.

phrases.zh: 等公司上市了你就财务自由了
phrases.en: Once the company goes public, you'll be financially free.

phrases.zh: 你很优秀，这次晋升先不考虑你了，以后有的是机会
phrases.en: You're excellent, but we won't consider you this round. There will be plenty of chances later.

phrases.zh: 这个版本先凑合，下个版本一定重构
phrases.en: Let's patch this version for now; we'll definitely refactor next release.

phrases.zh: 先把这波扛过去，年终一定给你惊喜
phrases.en: Get us through this phase first; you'll definitely get a year-end surprise.

phrases.zh: 这次先委屈一下你，明年肯定补给你
phrases.en: Bear with it this time; we'll definitely make it up to you next year.

phrases.zh: 把这个活接下来，后面资源都会向你倾斜
phrases.en: Take this on now, and resources will be prioritized for you later.

guilt.description: 通过道德压力让人服从

phrases.zh: 我对你是有期望的
phrases.en: I had high expectations for you.

phrases.zh: 我这都是为你好
phrases.en: I'm doing this for your own good.

phrases.zh: 公司让你加班是看重你，别人想要这个机会都没有
phrases.en: The company asks you to work overtime because you're valued; others don't even get this chance.

phrases.zh: 我花了这么多时间教你，你就这样回报我？
phrases.en: I spent so much time teaching you, and this is how you repay me?

phrases.zh: 你走了这个项目怎么办？
phrases.en: If you leave, what happens to this project?

phrases.zh: 吃亏是福
phrases.en: Taking losses is a blessing.

phrases.zh: 团队现在最难的时候，你怎么能只考虑自己？
phrases.en: The team is at its hardest moment; how can you only think about yourself?

phrases.zh: 大家都在撑着，你现在提这个是不是太自私了？
phrases.en: Everyone is holding on. Isn't it selfish for you to bring this up now?

phrases.zh: 我替你扛了那么多，你也该表示一下吧
phrases.en: I've covered so much for you; you should show some commitment.

threatening.description: 用失业和惩罚制造恐惧

phrases.zh: 要么忍，要么滚
phrases.en: Either endure it or get out.

phrases.zh: 你出去看看外面什么行情
phrases.en: Go outside and see what the market is like.

phrases.zh: 你不想干有的是人排队
phrases.en: If you don't want to do it, plenty of people are lined up.

phrases.zh: 现在经济不好你能有份工作就不错了
phrases.en: The economy is bad; you're lucky to even have a job.

phrases.zh: 这个行业圈子很小的，你想清楚
phrases.en: This industry's circle is small. Think carefully.

phrases.zh: 再这样下去只能换人了
phrases.en: If this continues, we'll have to replace you.

phrases.zh: 这个月再交不出来，直接按不胜任处理
phrases.en: If you still can't deliver this month, we'll handle it as incompetence.

phrases.zh: 绩效打低了对你以后都不好看
phrases.en: A low performance rating will hurt your future record.

phrases.zh: 你要是继续这样，我只能让HR介入
phrases.en: If you keep this up, I'll have to involve HR.

ownership.description: 以忠诚和奉献之名压榨边界

phrases.zh: 年轻人就是要多吃苦
phrases.en: Young people should suffer more.

phrases.zh: 格局大一点，不要计较
phrases.en: Think bigger, don't be so calculative.

phrases.zh: 做人要有奉献精神
phrases.en: You should have a spirit of sacrifice.

phrases.zh: 把公司当成家
phrases.en: Treat the company like your home.

phrases.zh: 让你加班是为你好，你不就能快速成长了吗
phrases.en: Making you work overtime is for your own good; won't that help you grow faster?

phrases.zh: 多做事少抱怨
phrases.en: Do more and complain less.

phrases.zh: 有ownership的人不会计较这些
phrases.en: People with ownership mindset don't fuss over these things.

phrases.zh: 真正有担当的人都会主动把周末时间腾出来
phrases.en: People with real responsibility proactively free up their weekends.

phrases.zh: 别总算计付出，团队需要你就该顶上
phrases.en: Stop calculating your effort; when the team needs you, you should step up.
